====Pokémon====
This listing is of Lenora's known Pokémon in the Pokémon Adventures manga.
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Lenora
|pkmn=Stoutland
|stage1=Lillipup
|stage2=Herdier
|type1=Normal
|img=Lenora Lillipup Herdier Adventures.png
|cap=Lenora's Lillipup
|img2=Lenora Stoutland Adventures.png
|img_size=200px
|epnum=PS472
|epname=Wheeling and Dealing
|desc={{p|Stoutland}} is Lenora's first seen Pokémon that she has owned since it was a {{p|Lillipup}}. It was used in Lenora's battle against Black where it shocked the boy with its {{m|Roar}} attack that sent his [[Musha]] back into its Poké Ball and later when it froze his [[Brav]] with a powerful {{m|Ice Fang}}. Later, it was used to face the Shadow Triad in battle.

Stoutland's known moves are {{m|Roar}}, {{m|Ice Fang}}, {{m|Take Down}}, and {{m|Last Resort}}, and its Ability is {{a|Intimidate}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Lenora
|pkmn=Patrat
|type1=Normal
|img=Lenora Patrat Adventures.png
|img_size=200px
|epnum=PS472
|epname=Wheeling and Dealing
|desc={{p|Patrat}} is Lenora's second seen Pokémon. Patrat was used in Lenora's battle against Black when it was suddenly sent out by his Brav's {{m|Whirlwind}} and was quickly defeated by Brav's {{m|Air Slash}}. Later, it was used to face the Shadow Triad in battle.

Patrat's only known move is {{m|Retaliate}}.}}
